Nvmez8Collect config and system information about NVMe devicesZ
nvme)
nvme-clic
/etc/nvme/discovery.confz	nvme listz
nvme list-subsys)	z
smartctl --all %(dev)sz
nvme list-ns %(dev)sz
nvme fw-log %(dev)sz
nvme list-ctrl %(dev)sz
nvme id-ctrl -H %(dev)sz
nvme id-ns -H %(dev)sz
nvme smart-log %(dev)sz
nvme error-log %(dev)sz
nvme show-regs %(dev)sz
nvme.*)
